response.justification: Maria has strong full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools, with notable contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and open-source tooling that align with the role’s needs; however, her resume lacks explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java — key required stack components — and her German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise environment.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple enterprises
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP frameworks
Strong open-source contributions and dev-ops experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest — core required technologies in the job description
Kotlin/Java experience is implied but not demonstrated in recent roles or projects
Basic German proficiency may limit effective collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team
